description: First backtest with archetype isolation architecture - per-archetype fusion, portfolio allocation, correlation filtering

notes: relative_score_percentile: Keep only top 70% of signals by fusion score
This prevents overtrading when many archetypes fire simultaneously
Higher thresholds in crisis = only high conviction trades
Lower thresholds in risk_on = capture more alpha in bull markets
This config uses the new v11 isolation architecture
Each archetype calculates its own fusion score (no shared fusion_total)
Portfolio allocator filters correlated signals to improve diversification
Regime classifier disabled for initial test (using static regime from features)
Start with small test period (Jan 2023) to verify integration works
